name: Quiver DevKit
subtitle: Arrow-sanctioned open-source VTOL development kit
shortDescription: A developer-focused Quiver kit for builders who want to test, modify, and extend Arrow's open-source VTOL platform.
longDescription: The Quiver DevKit is the first MVP catalog item for AIP-009-style manufacturing. This entry intentionally starts as limited availability while Arrow confirms kit contents, pricing, checkout links, and manufacturer-specific lead times.
intendedAudience: Experienced drone builders, developers, researchers, and experimental aircraft contributors.
safetyNotice: This is a developer kit, not a consumer drone. Buyers are responsible for safe assembly, inspection, operation, and regulatory compliance.
